_comment: Playable races. statMods multiply derived stats (missing key = 1.0). rareElementBias multiplies rare/epic element draw weights. tribulation multiplies tribulation success chance. Traits are flavor + the mechanical hook.

races.name: Human
races.trait: Versatile — no weakness in any cultivation path.

races.name: Beast
races.trait: Body Refinement — physique-based techniques flow easier.

races.name: Spirit Beast
races.trait: Spirit Affinity — higher chance of rare element cards.

races.name: Monster
races.trait: Savage Growth — greater raw power at the cost of harsher tribulations.
